_note: Canonical narrative section keys emitted by data_pipeline/document_parser.py, form-scoped. Financial-statement tables are intentionally excluded (numeric facts flow through financials_fetcher.py -> XBRL -> Azure SQL). The Part I/Part II parser fix corrected the TEXT filed under each key, not the key vocabulary itself, so this list is unchanged post-fix. Regenerate if the parser's section map changes: python -c "import json,glob; keys=set(s['section'] for f in glob.glob('data/parsed/**/*_10Q.json',recursive=True) for s in json.load(open(f,encoding='utf-8'))); print(sorted(keys))"
